What we do

Science-backed products. Market-ready results.

We turn ideas into safe, effective, and scalable products — from concept and formula to pilot, testing, and production support.

Explore services →

Product Development

Custom formulas for better performance, taste, texture, and shelf life.

Quality & Stability Testing

Lab testing, shelf-life studies, and compliance to ensure product integrity.

Scale-Up & Manufacturing Support

From pilot to production — we help bridge the gap seamlessly.

Market & Feasibility Insights

Data-driven insights to validate your idea and reduce risk.

Who's behind the bench

Two disciplines, one product development process.

Batch Theory pairs two decades of industrial food science with chemical engineering rigor, giving clients both formulation expertise and the process discipline needed to take a product from bench scale to production.

Food Science & Technology

Herlina Gustati

20 years as Product Development & QC Manager, PT Indofood Sukses Makmur Tbk · B.Sc. Agricultural Engineering, Gadjah Mada University

Has formulated and shelf-life-tested over 30 products across vegan proteins, functional beverages, sauces, bakery, and syrups — for clients from Jakarta to Cairo to New York. Leads sensory evaluation, HACCP, halal audit, and regulatory labelling.

Shelf-life extension HACCP / ISO 9000 Sensory evaluation
Chemical Engineering

Yoga Diatama Pohan

B.Eng. Chemical Engineering, Universitas Indonesia · Product R&D consultant on 20+ cross-industry projects via Kolabtree

Bridges the gap between a bench-scale formula and an industrial batch — leading feasibility studies, process scale-up, and supplier sourcing across F&B, consumer goods, and pharmaceutical projects, with experience managing cross-functional teams and client deliverables end to end.

Process scale-up Feasibility studies Supplier & vendor sourcing
Services

Three ways to work with us, depending on where your product is today.

Every engagement starts with a short intake call so we can scope the right tier and provide a tailored quote for your specific product.

01 / New Product Development

Build something new — from a formula you already like, or from scratch.

Choose the level of R&D your budget and timeline need.

  • Library formulaNo trial, ready base
  • Reverse engineeringMatch a target product
  • Full custom NPDFrom-scratch trials
Scope your product →
02 / Improvement & New Variants

Already selling? Fix, extend, or expand what's on shelf.

For existing businesses reformulating a product or launching a new flavor, format, or line extension off a proven base.

  • ReformulationCost, shelf-life, claims
  • New variantFlavor / format extension
  • Multi-variant bundleDiscounted per SKU
Improve your product →
03 / End-to-End & Co-Manufacturing

Have an idea but no time? We take it to a sellable, produced batch.

For founders working full-time elsewhere. We formulate, scale up, source a vetted co-packer, and supervise your first production run.

  • Formulation + scale-upIncluded
  • Co-packer sourcingIncluded
  • Ongoing QC liaisonOptional retainer
Launch your product →

Pricing is scoped per project based on complexity, timeline, and category — get in touch for a tailored quote.

Process

How a project actually moves, start to finish.

The same four stages apply whether you're buying a library formula or building an end-to-end product — only the depth of each stage changes.

01

Intake & scoping

A short call to understand your product, budget, timeline, and which service tier fits — followed by a written quote.

1–3 days
02

Formulation

Bench-scale development or adaptation of a library base, iterated against your taste, cost, and label targets.

1–4 weeks
03

Stability & scale-up

Shelf-life validation and translation of the bench formula into a process that survives real production equipment.

2–8 weeks
04

Handoff or co-manufacturing

Full documentation package for your own factory — or, for end-to-end clients, sourcing and supervising a co-packer through first production.

Ongoing option
Get in touch

Tell us what you're trying to build.

Whether it's a library formula, a full reformulation, or a product you haven't started yet — send us the brief and we'll come back with a scoped quote within two business days.
